title: Mode Routing Contract
description: Documents the mode system shared between Python (cognitive-sensor) and TypeScript (delta-kernel). Python proposes modes from a 3-mode subset; TypeScript finalizes using the full 6-mode set.

python_modes.description: Modes that Python cognitive-sensor can propose. Limited because Python lacks signals for RECOVER (sleep_hours), COMPOUND (assets_shipped), and SCALE (money_delta).

typescript_modes.description: Full mode set. TypeScript governance daemon can route to any mode using all signal dimensions.

mode_source.description: Which system proposed the mode. cognitive-sensor = Python 3-mode subset, governance-daemon = TypeScript full routing.

python_routing.description: Python uses closure_ratio and open_loops only

typescript_routing.description: TypeScript uses full 5-signal routing via Markov LUT

routing_contract.precedence: TypeScript daemon finalizes mode. When cognitive-sensor sends a mode via /api/ingest/cognitive, daemon may override it during next mode_recalc cycle using full signal set.
